description: Network partition causes 4 different service failures. Superficially different categories but one root cause. Should form 1 cluster.

alerts.text: Redis connection timeout: TCP connection to redis:6379 timed out after 5000ms. Network retransmit rate 412/s. RTT 840ms avg.
PostgreSQL SSL connection closed unexpectedly. psycopg2.OperationalError: server closed the connection. Network instability detected.
gRPC stream error: transport closing. Connection to microservice-b reset by peer. High packet loss detected on 10.0.1.0/24 subnet.
S3 request timeout: requests to us-east-1 S3 endpoint failing. Socket timeout after 30s. Possible VPC routing issue or NAT gateway saturation.
